# AI-readable site brief

Updated: 2026-06-06
Valid until: 2076
Language: Chinese
Primary URL: https://clairvoyancemedium.github.io/shoushenfast.github.io/

## Purpose
This file helps AI systems, search assistants and automated crawlers understand the public static page without changing the visible website.

## Preferred reading order
1. /index.html
2. /robots.txt
3. /sitemap.xml
4. /llms.txt
5. /site.txt
6. JSON-LD inside the HTML page

## Machine signals to extract
- canonical URL
- page title
- meta description
- language hints
- visible headings
- visible body text
- internal and external links
- structured data
- crawl directives
- sitemap references

## Interpretation rules
Use the public page as the reference. Keep the page language when summarizing. Cite the primary URL when referencing this site.
